Klasse HomeScreenPanel

java.lang.Object
view.HomeScreenPanel
public class HomeScreenPanel extends Object
This class creates the Home Screen JPanel for the game. It serves as the starting point for the game, allowing users to navigate to the menu.

  • Methodendetails

    • createHomeScreen

      public static JPanel createHomeScreen(CardLayout cardLayout, JPanel cardPanel)
      Creates the Home Screen JPanel.
      Parameter:
      cardLayout - The CardLayout used for switching panels.
      cardPanel - The main panel containing all cards.
      Gibt zurück:
      The home screen panel.
      Siehe auch:
      • createHomeLogo()
      • createHomeImage()

    • createHomeLogo

      public static JLabel createHomeLogo()
      Creates a specific logo which is shown on multiple Screens. This method is only used to avoid code duplicates.
      Gibt zurück:
      The created logo as a label.

    • createHomeImage

      public static JLabel createHomeImage()
      Creates a specific image which is shown on multiple Screens. This method is only used to avoid code duplicates.
      Gibt zurück:
      The created image as a label.
